summary: Analyst rating now shown in Company Info, and order status P&L fixed.
release_notes: Company Info now always supplements IB fundamental data with yfinance — fields IB does not provide (rating, analyst target, analyst count, insider %, institution %) are now consistently populated.
Fixed NameError in real-time order status updates — realized P&L is now tracked as a module-level variable and correctly included in live order status broadcasts.
